subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath testified that there is none other God but Him, and the Tongue, in its most glorious station, hath borne witness that He hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو و شهد اللسان فی مقامه الابهی قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies
